_comment: Single source of truth for CST vocabulary. Edit this file to add concepts. Run: node scripts/build-vocab.mjs to regenerate vocab/en/stems.json and vocab/ar/stems.json

_format.en.stem: English base stem (after suffixremoval) used for lookup
_format.ar.stem: Arabic stem after clitic stripping (used as lookup key in ar/stems.json)
_format.ar.word: Arabic surface form / irregular form (used as lookup key in ar/words.json)

en.gloss: meaning, what a word or phrase signifies
point, meaning or purpose of something
word, unit of language with meaning
phrase, group of words as a unit
equivalent, having the same value or meaning
way, method or manner of doing something
truth, what is true or real
translate, convert from one language to another
translation, text converted to another language
pronunciation, how a word is spoken
sentence, a grammatical unit of language
blog, online journal or informational site
headline, title of a news article
summary, brief statement of main points
revision, corrected version of a document
transcript, written record of spoken words
optimize, make as effective as possible
reset, set back to initial state
career, profession followed over a lifetime
plan, detailed proposal for doing something
effort, use of energy to do work
progress, forward movement toward a goal
problem, matter difficult to deal with
founder, person who establishes a company
stakeholder, person with interest in project
vendor, supplier of goods or services
outsource, hire external party for work
deliverable, output item of a project
scrum, agile framework for project management
roadmap, plan of future product development
backlog, list of pending work items
feedback, response to product or work
onboarding, process of integrating new users
invoice, bill for goods or services
quote, estimated price for a job
valuation, estimated worth of a company
equity, ownership share in a company
merger, combining two companies into one
remote, working from a non-office location
hybrid, mix of remote and in-office work
policy, set of guidelines or rules
boarding, getting onto a plane or bus
direction, course taken to reach destination
past participle of steal, taken illegally
life, the condition of being alive
world, the earth and all living things
universe, all of space and matter
reality, the state of things as they are

ar.gloss: be completed, be accomplished, be done

en.gloss: judge, official who decides legal cases
jurisdiction, legal authority of a court
patent, exclusive right to an invention
copyright, legal right over creative work
visa, credit card or travel permit
savings, money saved for future use
saving, act of putting money aside
checking account, bank account for daily use
fund, pool of money for investment
price, amount of money asked for goods
rate, measure of a quantity per unit
checkout, process of completing a purchase
wishlist, saved items for future purchase
tier, level of service or pricing
churn, rate customers stop using service
demand, consumer desire for a product
wholesale, selling in bulk at lower prices
brand, identity of a product or company
commission, fee for selling on behalf
promotion, special offer to boost sales
return, sending product back for refund
past tense of spend, expended money
follower, person who follows an account
influencer, person with large social following
post, message published on social media
like, approve or endorse a post
comment, textual response to a post
mention, referencing someone in a post
hashtag, keyword tag for social media
creator, person who makes digital content
stream, live video or audio content
review, evaluation of a product or service
ticket, record of a support request
escalation, raising issue to higher support
resolution, solving a problem or issue
experience, how something feels to user
economics, study of production and trade
injury, harm done to the body
wearable, device worn to track health
clinical trial, test of new treatment
preventive, stopping illness before it occurs
anxiety, feeling of worry or nervousness
solution, means of solving a problem
feature, notable aspect of a product
function, task something is designed to do
version, form of something at a point in time
component, part of a larger system
mode, method or way of operating
profile, set of characteristics or settings
serverless, cloud compute without server mgmt
endpoint, URL for an API request
payload, data sent in a request
throughput, amount processed per unit time
migration, moving data or code to new system
batch, group of items processed together
hosting, providing server space for apps
compute, processing power in the cloud
region, geographic location of data centers
cluster, group of servers working together
record, single entry in a database
ETL, extract transform load data process
analytics, analysis of data for insight
painting, work of art on surface
museum, place exhibiting art or history
plot, main events of a story
sun, central star of solar system
leaf, flat structure of a plant
face, front part of the head
mouth, opening for eating and speaking
foot, lower part of the leg
back, rear part of the body
blood, red fluid in the body
hair, filaments growing from the skin
tooth, hard structure in the mouth
throat, passage for food and air
dish, food prepared as a meal
fruit, sweet food from a plant
meat, flesh of an animal as food
dessert, sweet course at end of meal
flange, projecting flat rim for strength
paper, thin flat material for writing
era, long and distinct period of history
age, period of time in history
site, place where something is situated
route, course taken to reach a destination
station, place for trains or buses
clear, easy to perceive or understand
spicy, having strong flavor from spices
pretty, attractive in a delicate way
friend, person one has affection for
prompt, instruction given to an AI
fine-tuning, adapting a model on data
fine-tune, adapt AI model on specific data
tokenizer, tool that splits text into tokens
token, unit of text for AI processing
generative, AI that creates new content
benchmark, standard test for AI systems
alignment, ensuring AI follows human values
agentic, relating to autonomous AI agents

paywall, content requiring payment to access
MPG, miles per gallon, fuel efficiency
